stories.title: Woodland Leads Houston Open at -13 — Comeback from Brain Surgery

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Gary Woodland — brain surgery survivor, 2019 U.S. Open champion — leads the Houston Open at -13 heading into Moving Day.

Three shots clear. The comeback story of the year is playing out in real time.

#GolfFanrecap #HoustonOpen #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
THREE shots. That's Woodland's lead at the Houston Open through 36 holes.

Hojgaard and Suber both shot 62 in R2 and are still 3 back.

When the leaderboard AND the backstory both hit — this is what golf is. 🏌️

#GolfFanrecap #HoustonOpen #PGATour

article.headline: Gary Woodland Leads Houston Open at -13: A Comeback Story Heading Into Moving Day

stories.title: Lydia Ko Shoots 60 in Round 1 of Ford Championship

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LYDIA KO SHOT A 60.

12-under at Whirlwind Golf Club. Four straight birdies to open the round.

The best round of her LPGA Tour career — and she leads heading into Moving Day.

📍 Ford Championship, Phoenix

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #LydiaKo

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Round of 60. Four-birdie opening. Wire-to-wire lead through two rounds.

Lydia Ko is playing some of the best golf of her career in Phoenix.

Can she finish what she started on Sunday?

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #FordChampionship

article.headline: Lydia Ko Fires Career-Best 60 to Lead Ford Championship in Phoenix

stories.title: DeChambeau Dominates March — Back-to-Back LIV Wins

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau in March 2026:

✓ Won LIV Singapore (playoff)
✓ Won LIV South Africa (playoff over Rahm)
✓ $8,000,000 in prize money

Back-to-back wins. Five total LIV titles. The most dominant golfer alive right now.

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf #DeChambeau

article.headline: DeChambeau Wins Back-to-Back LIV Events in March, Claims $8 Million

stories.title: Masters 2026 Preview — Scheffler, McIlroy, Grand Slam Chasers

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
12 days until the Masters.

Scheffler: No. 1 in the world, +480 favorite.
McIlroy: Defending champion. Grand Slam complete.
Schauffele / Morikawa / Koepka: All chasing their own.

Augusta 2026 might be the most loaded field in years.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026 #Augusta

article.headline: Masters 2026 Preview: Scheffler Favored, McIlroy Defending, Three Players Chasing Grand Slams

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler withdrew from the Houston Open before the tournament.

No. 1 in the world. +480 Masters favorite. With the first major 12 days out.

Everything is fine. Probably. 🫤

#GolfFanrecap #HoustonOpen #PGATour

article.headline: Scheffler Withdraws from Houston Open; Grand Slam Chasers Converge on Augusta

stories.title: Hyo Joo Kim Won Founders Cup — Now Chasing Ko in Phoenix

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Hyo Joo Kim won the Fortinet Founders Cup last week — wire-to-wire, held off Nelly Korda.

Now she's chasing Lydia Ko (who shot a 60) in Phoenix.

Back-to-back LPGA wins? Wouldn't be the first time. 🏌️‍♀️

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #HyoJooKim

stories.title: Masters Grand Slam Chasers — Schauffele, Morikawa, Koepka

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Three players need ONLY a Masters title to complete their career Grand Slams in 2026:

Xander Schauffele.
Collin Morikawa.
Brooks Koepka.

McIlroy did it last year. Augusta is 12 days away.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026 #GrandSlam
